headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.

headline: Jim Cramer Recommends Elanco Over Zoetis
summary: Zoetis Inc. (NYSE:ZTS) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money, as he highlighted several opportunities in out-of-favor sectors. When a caller inquired about the stock during the lightning round, Cramer said: Zoetis, now, there’s something not well there. It’s the first time I’m going to say this, but I actually do prefer Elanco. […]

headline: A Look At Zoetis (ZTS) Valuation After Guidance Cut Legal Actions And Companion Animal Headwinds
summary: Zoetis (ZTS) is back in focus after a cluster of securities class action filings, all tied to weakening demand, rising competition, and safety concerns in its flagship Companion Animal portfolio. See our latest analysis for Zoetis. At a share price of $79.52, Zoetis has seen short term volatility with a 1 day share price return of 2.49% and 7 day share price return of 1.60%. However, momentum has been weak over longer periods, with the 30 day share price return down 29.34%, the 90 day share...
